folders.snapshots: Per-sorting immutable snapshot files under algorithms/<id>/snapshots/<base-stem>/.
folders.tables: Per-sorting binary benchmark datasets under algorithms/<id>/tables/.

AGENTS.md.description: Working instructions/policy for autonomous sorter optimization and command canon.

benchmark_search_cli.js.description: Parity benchmark search runner using the same shared session flow as orchestrator benchmarks; supports --from-shortlist.
benchmark_search_cli.js.algorithms/<id>/evolution/<base-stem>/be: Semicolon-delimited benchmark table with per-sorter metrics.
Machine-friendly benchmark payload with parity config and summaries.

benchmarks_cli.js.description: CLI benchmark entry point (quick/medium/balanced/large presets, optional custom candidate file).

benchmarks_core.js.description: Shared benchmark engine and report formatting for CLI tools.

cli_arg_utils_core.js.description: Shared CLI argument helpers (base-file normalization and positive-int parsing).

evolution_graph_cli.js.description: CLI renderer for evolution metadata -> SVG/HTML tree graph.
evolution_graph_cli.js.algorithms/<id>/evolution/<base-stem>/<i: Rendered HTML wrapper for the SVG graph (default location).

evolution_graph_core.js.description: Core graph layout/render logic shared by evolution graph tools.

generation_cli.js.description: CLI dataset generator for synthetic row tables.
generation_cli.js.<custom-output>.json: Optional generated JSON dataset when --out is provided.

generation_core.js.description: Shared row/table generation logic, schema metadata, and preset generation settings.

ideas_export_cli.js.description: Exports idea lines from algorithms/<id>/evolution/<base-stem>/<id>_progress.jsonl into compact context files for idea review.
ideas_export_cli.js.algorithms/<id>/evolution/<base-stem>/id: One line per snapshot in format: snapshot_id | idea.
One line per snapshot in format: snapshot=... | parent=... | branch=... | depth=... | idea=... | status=... | delta_vs_anchor_overall_score_p50=....
JSON array with the same context field names as the TXT lines.

native-sort.js.description: ESM wrapper exposing native Array.prototype.sort as a benchmark sorter module.

package.json.description: Project manifest (ESM mode, scripts, and in-repo file/folder map metadata).

run_cli_with_sorting.js.description: NPM script wrapper that enforces required sorting id and forwards to CLI as --sorting <id>.

simulate_evolution_cli.js.description: Synthetic evolution simulator for testing orchestrator behavior and graph rendering.

shared_benchmark_session_core.js.description: Single source of truth for shared-session benchmark execution (warmup/order/AB/session totals).

shortlist_candidates_cli.js.description: Builds a noise-aware candidate shortlist from algorithms/<id>/evolution/<base-stem>/<id>_progress.jsonl.
shortlist_candidates_cli.js.algorithms/<id>/evolution/<base-stem>/sh: Human-readable shortlist with ranking rationale and key metrics.
Machine-friendly shortlist JSON with shortlist, ranked view, and decision metrics.

store_table_cli.js.description: CLI for storing/loading binary table files used by benchmark presets.
store_table_cli.js.algorithms/<id>/tables/<custom-name>.bin: Saved binary dataset file for later reload.

store_table_core.js.description: Binary .bin table format encoder/decoder with embedded schema support.

sorting_experiments_cli.js.description: Anchored-DFS experiment orchestrator (next/prepare/auto-record/status) for sorting evolution.
sorting_experiments_cli.js.algorithms/<id>/snapshots/<base-stem>/<i: Immutable snapshot files produced per recorded iteration.
sorting_experiments_cli.js.algorithms/<id>/evolution/<base-stem>/<i: CSV progress log derived from each recorded snapshot entry.
JSONL progress log derived from each recorded snapshot entry.

unit_tests_cli.js.description: CLI wrapper to run unit-tests-core and print pass/fail output.

unit-tests-core.js.description: Shared unit test suite covering sorter correctness and benchmark/store invariants.
